news_title: Mobile-health Network Solutions and Jospong Group of Companies Partner to Launch AI-powered Digital Health Platform in Ghana
summary: Mobile-health Network Solutions (NASDAQ: MNDR)has signed a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) withJospong Group of Companiesto establish a joint venture for launching MNDR's AI-powered digital health platform in Ghana. The partnership combines MNDR's telehealth technology with Jospong's local market expertise and resources.The initiative targets Ghana'spopulation of over 33 million, aiming to improve healthcare accessibility, particularly in rural areas. Jospong, a major Ghanaian conglomerate withover 70 subsidiaries, will help MNDR establish its presence in Ghana's digital healthcare sector. This collaboration serves as a potential blueprint for MNDR's broader expansion across Africa.
